name: cowork-skills-upload
title: Upload Cowork Skills to your OneDrive
shortDescription: Uploads a custom SKILL.md file to the Cowork/skills folder in a user's OneDrive Agent Assets library using PnP PowerShell.
longDescription: Uploads a custom SKILL.md file to the Cowork/skills folder in a user's OneDrive using PnP PowerShell.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Upload Cowork Skills to OneDrive

references.name: Want to learn more about PnP PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the PnP PowerShell site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.

references.name: Resolve-PnPFolder cmdlet reference
references.description: Official cmdlet documentation for resolving and creating folder paths in SharePoint and OneDrive.

references.name: Add-PnPFile cmdlet reference
references.description: Official cmdlet documentation for uploading files to SharePoint and OneDrive libraries.
